name: Meatballs in Chile Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the corn tortillas into 6-inch diameter pieces.
2. Place the tortilla pieces and milk in a large bowl; let stand for 15 minutes.
3. Mix in the remaining ingredients (except basic red sauce and broth) in the bowl.
4. Shape the mixture into 1-inch balls.
5. Heat the basic red sauce and broth to boiling in a 10-inch skillet.
6. Reduce heat, add meatballs, cover, and simmer until done, about 15 to 20 minutes.
